violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under equipment and storage shelving in kitchen and walk in units.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Store mop in an elevated position to allow for air drying.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Chemical spray bottles being re-purposed for different chemicals.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
